channel.title: Tim's Game Lab
channel.description: Daily HTML5 browser games. New build most days.

item.title: Agent Budget Triage
item.description: You have $5 of API budget and a queue of 20 dev tasks — assign each task to the cheap Haiku, mid Sonnet, or expensive Opus agent without burning your runway before the milestone.

item.title: Tier-1 Repaint
item.description: Your CIS-flavored hypercasual is stuck at 0.4% CTR — swap title words, screenshot motifs, and hook copy to hit Tier-1 thresholds across three markets simultaneously.

item.title: Shit Truck
item.description: Drive a sanitation truck between overflowing bins, suck the sludge into the tank with a hold-to-vacuum nozzle, and dump at the plant before the tank ruptures.

item.title: Shader Chip Loadout
item.description: A flat dull screenshot has 8 effect zones and a tray of 12 shader chips — pick 5 that hit the publisher's hidden juice target.

item.title: Bins of Holding
item.description: A sorting game where every bin is bigger inside than outside — but the wrong items dropped together explode the bin's volume to zero.

item.title: Anti-Ant Colony
item.description: You're the QUEEN of a dying colony — sacrifice workers to seal the cracks an enemy colony is digging into YOUR walls.

item.title: Gerrymander
item.description: Drop 10 city halls on a voter map — Voronoi tessellation redraws every district line, and you must win 6 of 10 districts to seize parliament.

item.title: Lucky Egg Bias
item.description: Crack thirty eggs for random drops — but hidden bias rules tilt the odds; place lure crystals to deduce which crystal biases which item.

item.title: Trail Weaver
item.description: Steer two units leaving opposite-color trails — each can only walk on the OTHER's trail; paint 80% of the board without either getting cornered.

item.title: Tiny Dice Detective
item.description: Solve a 6-scene case by allocating 2 stat points and beating 2d6 dice checks — 3 fails and the trail goes cold.

item.title: Sausage Beam
item.description: Roll a laser-mounted sausage around a ring arena — momentum aims the beam, but the beam's recoil pushes you toward the edge.

item.title: Pruner's Tower
item.description: Tower-defense in reverse — start with a maxed defense grid and REMOVE turrets each wave to satisfy budget cuts set by city council.

item.title: Word Snake
item.description: Eat letters to grow your snake — spell real words for power boosts, avoid your own tail.

item.title: Style Mixer
item.description: Each round shows the same scene in two visual styles — pick the matching tile from a grid of 9 candidates before your guesses run out.

item.title: Satisfying Spill
item.description: Drag your mop across a tiled floor to absorb spreading spills before they reach the room's edges.

item.title: Mirror Match
item.description: Two armies on opposite sides of the board move in perfect mirror to your input — find the one move that lets your knight escape while the enemy mirror crashes into its own wall.

item.title: Reverse Tycoon
item.description: Inherit a thriving cafe and DEMOLISH it tile by tile to satisfy creditors — but each demolition kills customers whose tips were funding the next debt payment.

item.title: Anti-Match
item.description: Match-3 inverted — NEVER form a row of three same-color gems or the row explodes and crushes your column height. Survive 50 gravity drops with strategic anti-pattern.

item.title: Tiny Markov Forge
item.description: A pocket-sized Markov chain rolls procedural weapon parts each run — pick three from a streaming bag to assemble a build that survives a 5-wave gauntlet.

item.title: Shader Sell Job
item.description: Layer screen-space VFX on a plain prototype to hit a target 'feel score' before the publisher meeting — but each effect costs frame-budget you can't overspend.

item.title: Tier-1 Localiser
item.description: Translate incoming hooks across 5 region columns by spending limited glyph tokens before the queue overflows.

item.title: Token Throttle
item.description: You're a dispatcher routing tasks to cheap or expensive AI agents — pick wrong and your monthly budget burns before quota refills.

item.title: Ice Fracture Foreman
item.description: Tap a frozen lake to crack it in branching fissures, isolating fish into a shrinking pond before the cracks reach your hut.

item.title: Tiny Markov Dunge
item.description: A 200-byte room-generator paints your dungeon in real time — edit the seed before the boss spawns from your own typo.

item.title: Jelly Bounce
item.description: Slingshot a ball into a field of squishy jellies — clear every one in 5 shots. Bank-shots count, chain pops score double.

item.title: Matcha
item.description: Whisk the bowl in steady M-strokes — build foam to ceremony grade before the stroke budget runs out. Zen, no timer.

item.title: Shader Polish Sprint
item.description: Drag VFX layers (bloom, chromatic, grain, scanline, vignette, dither) onto a tiny prototype until the FEEL meter snaps green — but each layer burns polish-budget and over-stacking tanks the score.

item.title: Tiny Model Dodger
item.description: A tiny Markov model in the corner learns your dodge pattern and aims the next hazard wave at your favourite lane.

item.title: Cargo Chain Junction
item.description: Each turn flip ONE rail switch to route incoming cargo wagons into the matching colored depot — wrong depot blows the wagon and one of your three sidings.

item.title: Token Triage
item.description: Drag incoming AI requests into cheap/expensive model lanes before the budget bar empties.

item.title: Tier-1 Hook
item.description: Assemble a global-market store page from cards — title, screenshot, tag, first-frame — and beat the AI buyer panel.

item.title: Difficulty Curve
item.description: Drag tower-defense waves up or down to keep the fun-meter inside a moving target band.

item.title: Loom Weaver
item.description: Weave colored threads row by row to reveal today's hidden tapestry — earlier rows hide under later ones.

item.title: Mason's Hammer
item.description: Strike a stone slab so cracks propagate exactly along your target line — without crossing forbidden veins.

item.title: Pendulum Sniper
item.description: Your crosshair is a swinging pendulum — you don't aim, you ARREST it at the right moment.

item.title: Civ Pivot
item.description: Your civ forces you to swap identity every era — pick the new culture that preserves the most of your old bonuses or your empire collapses.

item.title: Agent Dispatcher
item.description: Route incoming tasks to cheap or expensive AI agents — wrong routing burns your token budget before the queue clears.

item.title: Polish Pass
item.description: Spend a fixed budget of polish points on a 90%-done game to push it across the ship line before backers lose patience.

item.title: Core Drill
item.description: Drill core samples through soil tiles to fully reveal the daily buried artefact before charges run out.

item.title: Varnish Restore
item.description: Rub yellow varnish off a daily oil painting without scrubbing through the fragile paint beneath.

item.title: Glyph Lock
item.description: Decode today's emoji-rebus phrase in three guesses; share your guess trail like Wordle.

item.title: Overcharge Donut
item.description: Hold to charge a donut launcher; release in the sweet spot for a perfect arc, overshoot and the donut detonates on the pad.

item.title: Glacier Splitter
item.description: Tap fault lines to fracture an iceberg into chunks that exactly match buyer weight orders before your hammer pool runs out.

item.title: Wishlist Climb
item.description: Pick one marketing action per day — devlog, trailer, festival, meme — and steer your indie game from 0 to 20k wishlists before your runway burns out.

item.title: Path Foreman
item.description: Draw four color-coded village paths across a tile budget without letting any of them cross or run out of stones.

item.title: Lily Frog
item.description: Hop a frog across sinking lilypads to reach the golden fly before every pad goes under.

item.title: Frost Crack
item.description: Send cracks along a frozen lake's grid to encircle and pop out a gem before the whole sheet shatters from stress.

item.title: Forge Heir
item.description: You inherit one cursed sword and must un-forge it stroke by stroke — each hammer hit may remove a curse, expose a new one, or break the blade.

item.title: Gravity Mailman
item.description: Throw letters from a tiny planet — but each letter you launch shifts the planet's center of mass, deflecting your next throw.

item.title: Echo Locator
item.description: Ping a black void with sonar clicks to map invisible enemies and walls — every ping costs battery and reveals YOU to the things listening.

item.title: Vowel Hold'em
item.description: Five consonants in your hand, vowels flip in the middle Texas-Hold'em-style — bet that you can spell a longer word than the bot before the river reveals.

item.title: Pong Wars Reverse
item.description: Both paddles are yours. Miss the ball on purpose so it converts enemy tiles. Hit it and you protect the wrong team.

item.title: Brutalist Stack
item.description: Stack 20 concrete blocks before sunset to cast the longest shadow — squat foundations win quietly while the sun marches west.

item.title: Gunsmith Draft
item.description: Draft cards of gun parts each turn and assemble complete weapons to fill orders before the deck runs out.

item.title: Token Budget
item.description: Route tasks through cheap or expensive AI agents on a hex grid, finishing the queue before your token budget zeroes out.

item.title: Battleships Skirmish
item.description: Place your fleet, take turns guessing on a daily-seeded board, salvo bonus on streaks. One-screen browser version with shareable result card.

item.title: Slingshot Scrap
item.description: Pull-back slingshot to fling junk at trash stacks, knocking it into a recycle pit.

item.title: Tiny Tower Defense
item.description: Place 4 tower types on a 5x5 grid. Survive 10 waves of scouts, tanks, swarms and flyers.

item.title: Donut Drift Arena
item.description: Drift a glowing donut around a dirty rink. Tighter drift line = more crumbs swept per pass.

item.title: Tower Balance
item.description: Stack physics-driven blocks on a wobbly platform. Perfect-stack streaks unlock wider blocks, tilt past 25° and the tower falls.

item.title: Bubble Pop Lab
item.description: Pop colored bubbles by drawing a line through 3+ same-color neighbours.

item.title: Junk Food Poker
item.description: Poker hands, but with food. Full Burger = Full House, Meal Deal = Flush. Sauce-card jokers add multipliers. Instantly readable.

item.title: Bacteria Bloom
item.description: Place colored bacteria on a petri-dish grid, infect adjacent cells, chain same-color = outbreak combo. Mutations + antibiotics + super-spreaders.

item.title: Tire Escape
item.description: Tire rolling horizontally through a city, bouncing off cars, signs, walls. Cops chase. Distance = score, every bounce = combo.

item.title: Creature Hunt
item.description: Multiplayer hide-and-seek in a procedural dungeon. Survive as one of 10 humans or hunt them all as the creature. Real-time online or solo with bots.

item.title: Daily Dodge
item.description: 60-second top-down dodger. Daily seed — every player faces the exact same projectile pattern today. Beat your personal record.

item.title: Apartment Cleaner
item.description: Top-down room cleaner — 6 visually distinct rooms (Kitchen, Bathroom, Bedroom...) each with a different palette, furniture, and dirt patterns.

item.title: Rail Tycoon
item.description: Drag rails between colored stations. Cargo auto-routes to its matching color. Five strikes and you're bankrupt.

item.title: Ice Sweeper
item.description: Pilot an icebreaker over a grid of dirty ice tiles. Crack → chunk → vacuum. Chain neighbours for combo bonuses.

item.title: Clean Sweep Donut
item.description: Roll a sprinkled donut through dirty rooms, absorbing crumbs, mud, wrappers, then bigger trash. Combos for higher scores.
